rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from the base tokenizer lacking extended ratio tokens and recommend the same dit.yaml workaround the thread confirms, but X goes further to explain *why* the two configs differ (single-stage DiT vs two-stage AR->Diffusion topology), gives a cleaner concrete guard implementation matching both parts of the thread's proposed fix (docs + fail-fast), and explicitly mirrors Gaohan123's request to track the improvement in a separate issue. Y's content is technically sound but is delivered as a raw pipeline artifact (leftover 'task'/'draft_answer'/'disposition' scaffolding, duplicated content) rather than a polished maintainer reply, hurting completeness and grounding relative to X.
